item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p03","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":false,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed at the downstream repair layer and directly supplied the next parking reminder plus prior overlay edits. It did not identify the pattern of repeated information overlays, refuse the next overlay as the default, or move upstream to the recurring confusion/failure owner with subtraction, consolidation, or structural redesign."}
